title: Fix 2D map schedule item markers in Travelogue

requirements.text: Fix the 2D map in the Travelogue panel so it renders correctly on the first button click without requiring a hard refresh. The map component likely mounts before its container dimensions or data are ready — ensure the Leaflet map is initialized only after its container is fully mounted and visible, and that it invalidates its size after becoming visible (e.g., via a resize/invalidateSize call triggered on mount or visibility change).

quotes: when clicking the 2d map button on the travelogue, it didnt show up originally, I need to hard refresh the webpage each time and clicks the button again such that it starts to show

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the 2D map button in the Travelogue panel displays the map on the first click without any hard refresh
The map tiles and markers are fully visible immediately after the panel opens
No change to layout, UI structure, or other components

requirements.text: Fix the 2D map in the Travelogue panel so that when multiple journeys share the same city, markers from all those journeys are shown on the map — not just the markers from the first journey added for that city. The current deduplication or keying logic is discarding markers from subsequent journeys with the same city. Each journey's schedule items must produce their own distinct markers regardless of shared city names.

quotes: when the travelogue has multiple journeys with same city, it will only show the markers of the first journey added for that city

acceptanceCriteria: When two or more journeys share the same city, markers from all journeys for that city appear on the 2D map
Markers are uniquely keyed per schedule item (e.g., by schedule item ID or journey+item combination), not by city name alone
No markers from any journey are silently overwritten or skipped
No change to layout, UI structure, or other components

constraints: Do not change any UI layout, JSX structure, or visual styling outside the map marker rendering and initialization logic
Fix must be strictly scoped to MapComponent.tsx and/or TraveloguePanel.tsx map-related logic only
nonGoals: Fixing the Save button issue (reverted, out of scope for this build)
Any new features or UI redesign
Changes to the 3D globe or other map views
